subject: CRM Phase 1A: Event card enhancements (Stories 9, 10)
description: Story 9: Add Edit button + quick action dock (Phone/Email/Map) to EventCardHover.tsx. Story 10: Create StatusDropdown.tsx with 5 statuses (Inquiry/Proposal Sent/Booked/Ready for Prep/Completed) as clickable dropdown replacing static badge. Use shadcn Select. Wire through crm-bento-grid.tsx.
